headline: OpenAI-Backed Anchr Targets $1T Food Distribution Chain with AI-Native Platform
summary: Anchr has raised $5.8M led by a16z Speedrun and OpenAI to build AI-native infrastructure for food distribution — a sector spanning restaurants, grocers, and caterers that runs almost entirely on legacy ERP and manual logistics. The a16z and OpenAI backing signals conviction that vertical AI platforms in physical supply chains are the next frontier after SaaS displacement. OCI should evaluate Anchr as an early infrastructure partner before AWS and Azure lock in the food-tech AI stack.
oci_implication: OCI should engage Anchr directly on compute and data platform needs, and position Oracle Fusion SCM and Oracle Food & Beverage as complementary enterprise layers — creating a bundled GTM motion with GSIs like Deloitte and Accenture who already serve major food distributors such as Sysco and US Foods.
